# Meridian

> Meridian is the open-source design system behind every Efolusi product: 104 accessible React components, 158 design tokens (light, dark, compact), blocks, charts, and full product UI kits — served browser-native with zero build step. MIT licensed.

This repo is a monorepo: tokens, components, blocks, templates, and product kits live together and ship as one stylesheet plus one compiled bundle.

## Start here

- /README.md — overview, principles, content fundamentals
- /SKILL.md — the agent skill: how to build Efolusi-branded interfaces with Meridian
- /styles.css — stylesheet entry (imports /tokens/*)
- /_ds_bundle.js — compiled component bundle (all components on one global namespace)
- /_ds_manifest.json — machine-readable registry of components, tokens, cards

## Components

104 components in /components/<group>/ across 12 groups: forms, display, navigation, feedback, data, overlay, ai, code, files, dates, finance, icons.

Every component ships three per-component flat files (plus a shared per-group specimen card HTML):

- <Name>.jsx — the source (vendor it freely)
- <Name>.d.ts — typed props interface
- <Name>.prompt.md — usage guidance for humans and LLMs

## Usage

Load the stylesheet and bundle, then read components off the namespace:

    const { Button } = window.EfolusiDesignSystem_4ffc3d;

Dark mode: set data-theme="dark" on any subtree. Compact density: data-density="compact". Semantic tokens only — never raw ramp values.

## More

- /guidelines/ — accessibility, forms, governance
- /templates/ds-site/ — the documentation site (open /index.html)
- /blocks/, /ui_kits/, /templates/ — pre-composed sections, product kits, page shells
- /CHANGELOG.md, /CONTRIBUTING.md, /SECURITY.md, /LICENSE
